overview.description: Power BI and Microsoft Fabric consulting and data analytics company
overview.description_long: DataBrothers is a Prague-based consulting and technology company specializing in Power BI, Microsoft Fabric, and data analytics. They design Lakehouse architectures, automate data ingestion and transformation, build semantic layers and reporting, optimize Power BI environments, and provide mentoring and training programs. Certified Microsoft Solutions Partner for Data & AI and ISO 9001/27001. Also organizes DATA POINT PRAGUE and POWER CONFERENCE, international events on Microsoft data stack and Power Platform.

history.origin_story: Founded in Prague by Štěpán and Matěj Rešl as a specialist Power BI consulting firm; grew into a full Microsoft data stack partner covering Power BI, Microsoft Fabric, and Power Platform.

key_milestones.event: Company registered as DataBrothers s.r.o. in Prague
LinkedIn company page established; active growth phase
Achieved Microsoft Solutions Partner for Data & AI designation
Štěpán Rešl recognized as Microsoft Data Platform MVP

leadership.name: Štěpán Rešl
leadership.role: Lead Technology Consultant (Microsoft Data Platform MVP)

awards: Microsoft Solutions Partner for Data & AI

metadata.notes: Founded year 2018 per Czech ARES business registry (IČO: 07080794); LinkedIn shows 2020 which may be when they pivoted focus or created the profile. Company is primarily a BI/data consulting firm — not a traditional AI startup; included in Prague AI catalog due to Microsoft AI/Fabric work and AI conference hosting. Matěj Rešl is referenced as CEO on careers page ('Náš CEO'). Company also has second office address at Čestmírova 17a, Praha 4 per LinkedIn.
